trial_details.trajectory:
The pod is in a ErrImageNeverPull status, which indicates that the image specified in the pod spec cannot be pulled.The pod is failing to pull the image "misspeling-app:latset" because the image does not exist. The pod spec has a typo in the image name ("misspeling" instead of "misspelling").I fixed the issue by patching the deployment to use the correct image name "misspelling-app:latest".

FIX COMPLETE

   Output: deployment.apps/misspelling-deployment patched...
